channel.title: Feature-Extraction on Systology
channel.description: Recent content in Feature-Extraction on Systology

item.title: Media Analysis
item.description: Best practices for resilient media feature extraction pipelines; ensuring stable representation schemas, choosing between streaming and batch modes, enforcing metadata preservation, and performance engineering.

item.title: Video Analysis
item.description: An exploration of multimodal video feature extraction comparing Apple-native frameworks (Vision, AVFoundation, Core Image) against cross-platform C++/Python toolchains (OpenCV, pybind11) for ML prep.
